what_it_does: Records metadata for a design-source image asset named capital-raise/p-26 and labels it as source design ground-truth.
observations: Frontmatter declares an image/jpeg blob with zero width and height.
The file path and id identify it as a design-source image for capital-raise page 26.
The body states it is SOURCE design ground-truth for capital-raise/p-26.jpg.
standouts: Marked explicitly as design ground-truth source material.
Dimensions are recorded as 0x0 despite being an image.
concerns: Width and height are zero, which may indicate missing or uncomputed image dimensions.
The links array is empty so no explicit relationships are recorded.
No alt text, caption, or content description is provided.
notes: This is a ledger entry that registers a single JPEG design-source image for a capital-raise document, but its dimensions are unset and it has no outgoing links.
questions: Why are the image width and height set to 0?
What content or page does p-26 correspond to in the capital-raise deck?
Is the blob URI resolvable and does it match the referenced jpg?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose is to hold source design ground-truth for an image; the file does that as a metadata record, but it lacks computed dimensions and relationships.
intention_signals: To create a neutral, content-addressed ledger record that preserves the original design image as ground truth for later reference or fusion.
contribution: Provides a stable metadata anchor and blob reference for a design-source image asset, which a fused system can use to locate and verify the original visual material.
summary_for_embedding: A ledger metadata record for the design-source JPEG image capital-raise/p-26 with a blob reference, zero dimensions, and an explicit source ground-truth label.
intention_for_embedding: To register the original design image for page 26 of a capital-raise asset as ground truth in a content-addressed ledger.
